assertions.description: The top-level LittleSixteen.sch correctly traverses all 14 sub-sheets (cpu, ted, ram, rom, keyboard, datasette, exp_port, misc, pla, joysticks, avout, userport, sid). Component counts (368 total, 35 ICs, 88 caps, 65 resistors, 58 ferrite beads) and 3 crystal circuits are plausible for a Commodore Plus/4 clone. UART detection on rxd_ttl/txd_ttl nets is reasonable.
